name: Rajesh Venkataraman
title: Former VP of Sales, Salesforce APAC
bio: 20+ years in enterprise SaaS sales. Scaled Salesforce's APAC business from $50M to $500M ARR. Deep expertise in navigating complex procurement processes at Fortune 500 companies. Previously advised 8 Together Fund portfolio companies on US GTM strategy.
past_advisory: Helped Composio structure their first enterprise pilot with a Fortune 100 bank
Advised DreamTeam on pricing tiers for US enterprise segment
corridor_expertise: US market entry from India

name: Dr. Priya Mehta
title: Chief Medical Informatics Officer, Stanford Health
bio: Board-certified physician and informaticist. Led the deployment of AI diagnostic tools across Stanford Health's 18 facilities. Expert in navigating FDA's AI/ML regulatory framework and HIPAA compliance for AI startups.
past_advisory: Reviewed architecture of two healthcare portfolio companies for HIPAA readiness
corridor_expertise: US healthcare regulatory landscape

name: Amit Bhasin
title: CTO & Co-founder, Previously at Flipkart

past_advisory: Reviewed Emergent's agentic IDE architecture
Helped ArchitectChips design their multi-agent chip design pipeline
corridor_expertise: India engineering to global product

name: Sarah Chen
title: Partner, Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati
bio: 15 years specializing in cross-border venture capital transactions. Has structured over 200 India-to-US entity flips for VC-backed startups. Expert in optimizing cap tables for follow-on institutional rounds.
past_advisory: Guided 5 SwarmSpace cohort companies through Delaware incorporation
Structured the ESOP pool for Coreworks' Series A
corridor_expertise: US-India legal and corporate structuring

name: Karthik Reddy
title: Former Head of Product, Freshworks

past_advisory: Coached 3 SwarmSpace companies on PLG metrics and conversion funnels
Helped Sentra.app redesign their onboarding flow
corridor_expertise: India PLG to US enterprise transition

title: CISO, Fortune 100 Financial Services Firm
bio: 25 years in enterprise cybersecurity. Currently responsible for security architecture at a top-5 US bank. Regularly evaluates AI vendor security postures for enterprise procurement. Can provide the 'buyer's perspective' on security requirements.
past_advisory: Ran mock security reviews for 2 portfolio companies preparing for enterprise pilots
corridor_expertise: US enterprise security and compliance requirements

name: Neha Sharma
title: VP of Engineering, Stripe India
bio: Scaled Stripe India's engineering team from 15 to 200 engineers. Expert in building API-first products that developers love. Deep knowledge of fintech regulatory requirements across US and India markets.

Helped 2 SwarmSpace fintech companies with hiring strategy
corridor_expertise: India engineering talent to global fintech

name: David Park
title: Former VP Marketing, HubSpot

past_advisory: Created marketing playbook for 3 portfolio companies
Helped Capitol with content strategy
corridor_expertise: US B2B marketing and brand building

name: Dr. Anand Rao
title: Professor of AI, IIT Madras & Former Global AI Lead, PwC

past_advisory: Technical reviewer for Gibran's scale-free learning architecture
Evaluated 4 portfolio companies' AI architectures for investment committee
corridor_expertise: India AI research to global product innovation

past_advisory: Helped 2 portfolio companies build their first CS playbook
corridor_expertise: US enterprise customer success

name: Vikram Patel
title: Serial Entrepreneur, 3x Founder (2 exits)
bio: Founded 3 B2B SaaS companies, 2 acquired (one by Zoho, one by a US PE firm). Deep personal experience with the emotional and operational challenges of building across the US-India corridor. Mentor at SwarmSpace since Cohort 1.
past_advisory: Mentored 12 SwarmSpace founders on fundraising strategy
Coached 3 solo founders through co-founder search process
corridor_expertise: India founder journey — fundraising and emotional resilience

name: Jennifer Wu
title: Director of AI/ML, Google Cloud

title: Partner, Deloitte AI Practice (India)
